scenes.description: Hololive Indonesia members conclude their performance of "Show Them (Who You Are)".
Hololive English members (Myth, Council+Hope, and Advent) perform "All for One".

subtitles.original: ...show them and travel far
subtitles.english: ...show them and travel far

subtitles.original: Running and show them who you are
subtitles.english: Running and show them who you are

subtitles.original: Keindahan dunia akhirnya
subtitles.english: The beauty of the world at last

subtitles.original: Semua kan baik saja
subtitles.english: Everything will be alright

subtitles.original: Arahkan pandanganmu
subtitles.english: Direct your gaze

subtitles.original: Tajam lurus ke depan
subtitles.english: Sharp straight ahead

subtitles.original: Tuk mulai bermimpi
subtitles.english: To start dreaming

subtitles.original: Genggamlah yang kau cari
subtitles.english: Hold on to what you search for

subtitles.original: Takkan ada...
subtitles.english: There won't be...

subtitles.original: La la la la la...
subtitles.english: La la la la la...

subtitles.original: Kau takkan sendiri
subtitles.english: You won't be alone

subtitles.original: Show them and travel far
subtitles.english: Show them and travel far

subtitles.original: Running and show them who you are
subtitles.english: Running and show them who you are

subtitles.original: I'll be singing...
subtitles.english: I'll be singing...

subtitles.original: La la la la la...
subtitles.english: La la la la la...

subtitles.original: Kau takkan pernah sendiri
subtitles.english: You'll never be alone

subtitles.original: It's time to show them who you are
subtitles.english: It's time to show them who you are

subtitles.original: Just shout it from the mountain high
subtitles.english: Just shout it from the mountain high

subtitles.original: To the sky we go...
subtitles.english: To the sky we go...

subtitles.original: We go, oh!
subtitles.english: We go, oh!

subtitles.original:
All for One
作詞：Steph 作曲：BLACCHOLE / Haruna / Yohei Abe
編曲：BLACCHOLE
subtitles.english:
All for One
Lyrics: Steph Composition: BLACCHOLE / Haruna / Yohei Abe
Arrangement: BLACCHOLE

subtitles.original: Just look around and see
subtitles.english: Just look around and see

subtitles.original: It's so incredible
subtitles.english: It's so incredible

subtitles.original: So many smiles in the sea of light
subtitles.english: So many smiles in the sea of light

subtitles.original: Take one step with me
subtitles.english: Take one step with me

subtitles.original: And you'll be dazzled
subtitles.english: And you'll be dazzled

subtitles.original: There's magic in the air tonight
subtitles.english: There's magic in the air tonight

subtitles.original: The hours zoom zoom zoom
subtitles.english: The hours zoom zoom zoom

subtitles.original: My heart goes boom boom boom
subtitles.english: My heart goes boom boom boom

subtitles.original: The world is brighter because you believe in me
subtitles.english: The world is brighter because you believe in me

subtitles.original: Let's shout it loud loud loud
subtitles.english: Let's shout it loud loud loud

subtitles.original: Our time is right now
subtitles.english: Our time is right now

subtitles.original: We're on the edge of destiny
subtitles.english: We're on the edge of destiny

subtitles.original: For a moment I can dream with you
subtitles.english: For a moment I can dream with you

subtitles.original: Every miracle we hope for might come true
subtitles.english: Every miracle we hope for might come true

subtitles.original: We come together reaching out from far and wide
subtitles.english: We come together reaching out from far and wide

subtitles.original: And suddenly you're here by my side
subtitles.english: And suddenly you're here by my side

subtitles.original: When our voices and hearts unite
subtitles.english: When our voices and hearts unite

subtitles.original: We're gonna shine bright together, we're all for one
subtitles.english: We're gonna shine bright together, we're all for one

subtitles.original: Let's sing! All for one
subtitles.english: Let's sing! All for one

subtitles.original: The thrill of happiness is all around us
subtitles.english: The thrill of happiness is all around us

subtitles.original: Jump in 'cause it's all for one
subtitles.english: Jump in 'cause it's all for one

subtitles.original: Let's sing! All for one
subtitles.english: Let's sing! All for one

subtitles.original: We're on our way to good times, goodbye
subtitles.english: We're on our way to good times, goodbye

subtitles.original: We'll treasure this day the rest of our lives
subtitles.english: We'll treasure this day the rest of our lives

subtitles.original: Hey! All that we waited for
subtitles.english: Hey! All that we waited for

subtitles.original: The dream we're striving toward
subtitles.english: The dream we're striving toward

subtitles.original: We're singing all for one, all for one
subtitles.english: We're singing all for one, all for one

subtitles.original: Everything's in motion
subtitles.english: Everything's in motion

subtitles.english: Get up, it's a celebration

subtitles.english: Come see the wonders here beyond imagination

subtitles.english: We're joining hands for the world to see

subtitles.original: Uh-huh, feel the love and the energy
subtitles.english: Uh-huh, feel the love and the energy

subtitles.english: The hours zoom zoom zoom

subtitles.english: A hazy whirlwind of dreams and reality

subtitles.original: Let's shout it loud loud loud
subtitles.english: Let's shout it loud loud loud

subtitles.english: Our time is right now

subtitles.english: We're here together, finally

subtitles.english: Every moment takes my breath away

subtitles.original: There's a feeling here that words cannot convey
subtitles.english: There's a feeling here that words cannot convey

subtitles.original: Hear the rhythm as we rise to meet the song
subtitles.english: Hear the rhythm as we rise to meet the song

subtitles.english: And suddenly our hearts beat as one

subtitles.english: Every voice ringing loud and clear
